allow: Bash(node -e "const { Midi } = require\('@tonejs/midi'\); console.log\('ok', typeof Midi\);")

Bash(node -e "const { Midi } = require\('@tonejs/midi'\); const fs = require\('fs'\); const midi = new Midi\(\); const track = midi.addTrack\(\); track.name = 'Demo'; [60,62,64,65,67,69,71,72].forEach\(\(n,i\) => track.addNote\({midi:n, time:i*0.5, duration:0.45, velocity:0.8}\)\); midi.header.setTempo\(100\); const b = Buffer.from\(midi.toArray\(\)\); fs.writeFileSync\('public/demo.mid', b\); console.log\(b.length\);")
